features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
It’s time to put your skin in the spotlight! - Energise your skin with our Face Facts Collagen & Q10 Night Cream, helps improve skin elasticity + protects skin.
Hero here is ubiquinone (Q10) an awesome antioxidant - Its known to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines
Rich overnight face moisturiser - With hard working actives like Collagen & Glycerin, working its magic while you sleep so you can wake up to smoother, softer and more supple skin.
Vitamin E is awesome antioxidant - that helps improve skin elasticity and protect against premature ageing.
description: Product Description Energise your skin with this night cream, helps improve skin elasticity + protects skin.The hero here is ubiquinone (Q10) an awesome antioxidant as its known to temporarily reduce the appearance of fine lines. With nice ingredients like collagen that make your skin soft, smooth and lovely. Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Cetearyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-6, Glyceryl Stearate, Dimethicone, Disiloxane, Propanediol, Ammonium Polyacrylate, DMDM Hydantoin, C13-16 Isoparaffin, Laureth-30, Parfum, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Laureth-7, Polyacrylamide, Hydrolyzed Collagen, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Ubiquinone, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Linalool. Directions Use after exfoliating, cleansing & toning the skin. Apply a small amount of the moisturiser before bed. Use circular movements to gently massage the cream into the skin. Do not rinse off. Use daily, alongside the Face Facts Collagen & Q10 range to complete your skincare routine. See more
